nasb.text: So the common man has been humbled And the man of importance has been abased, But do not forgive them.

esv.text: So man is humbled, and each one is brought low— do not forgive them!

cnv.text: 卑賤人向偶像俯首， 尊貴人也降卑， 所以不可饒恕他們。

ccb.text: 他们必遭羞辱和贬抑。 耶和华啊， 求你不要赦免他们。

csbs.text: 这样，人人降卑，个个卑贱。 耶和华啊，求你不要饶恕他们！
